asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates a multi-agent startup diligence workflow, showing research enrichment, public/private agent interaction, and human-in-the-loop handoffs with clear UI states.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows transition from spreadsheet to research enrichment and multi-agent execution clearly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates full flow from pending accounts to completed research and draft handoffs.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with well-defined panels for binder, workspace, and copilot.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the product's core pillars: spreadsheets, public/private agents, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captures real UI interactions, live status updates, and realistic data inputs.

legibility.evidence: Main UI elements and captions are readable, though some trace logs are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly applicable to financial diligence, GTM research, and agentic workflow automation.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly shows human-in-the-loop approval gates and pending states rather than instant magic.

defects.observed: The trace log text at the bottom is quite small and may be difficult to read on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size of the trace log panel or zoom in slightly during recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run multi-agent diligence workflows with secure private lanes and human-in-the-loop approval gates directly inside NodeRoom.
